items.title: Thirteen killed in Israeli strikes on southern Lebanon, health ministry says
items.raw_content: Four women and a child are among the dead, as fighting between Israel and Iran-backed Hezbollah continues despite a ceasefire.
items.ai_summary: 以色列对黎巴嫩南部的空袭造成13人死亡，包括四名妇女和一名儿童，尽管停火协议仍在，但冲突持续。

items.title: Ex-F1 driver and Paralympic champion Zanardi dies
items.raw_content: Former Formula 1 driver and Paralympic champion Alex Zanardi dies at the age of 59.
items.ai_summary: 前F1车手和残奥冠军亚历克斯·扎纳尔迪去世，享年59岁。

items.title: The remarkable life of Zanardi, a 21st century hero who inspired millions
items.raw_content: Alex Zanardi was a 21st century hero - a man who inspired millions through his unquenchable spirit in the face of unbelievable adversity, writes Andrew Benson.
items.ai_summary: 亚历克斯·扎纳尔迪，一位21世纪的英雄，以不屈精神面对逆境，激励了数百万人。

items.title: Some protests may need to stop, PM suggests, after calls for pause on pro-Palestinian marches
items.raw_content: The PM tells the BBC he is concerned about the "cumulative" effect of marches on the Jewish community.
items.ai_summary: 首相表示担心亲巴勒斯坦游行对犹太社区的累积影响，暗示某些抗议可能需要停止。

items.title: Trump tells Congress ceasefire means he does not need their approval for Iran war
items.raw_content: The president writes that hostilities "have terminated" because of the ceasefire, arguing he does not need congressional authorisation.
items.ai_summary: 特朗普告知国会停火协议意味着他无需国会批准对伊朗开战。

items.title: 'If we sleep, they bite': Rats and weasels infest camps for displaced Gazans
items.raw_content: In the Gaza Strip, the daily battles are now with rats, weasels, and other pests spreading diseases.
items.ai_summary: 加沙流离失所者营地中老鼠和鼬鼠肆虐，传播疾病。

items.title: US to cut troop levels in Germany by 5,000 amid Trump spat with Merz
items.raw_content: The decision to reduce the US deployment to Germany comes amid a row between the two allies over Iran.
items.ai_summary: 美国计划从德国撤军5000人，此举发生在与德国领导人默茨就伊朗问题发生争执之际。

items.title: Allen holds on as Wu dazzles - semi-final on a knife edge
items.raw_content: Wu Yize and Mark Allen are locked at 11-11 in their World Championship semi-final at the Crucible Theatre - and a late night could be on the cards.
items.ai_summary: 斯诺克世锦赛半决赛吴宜泽与马克·艾伦战成11-11平，竞争激烈。

items.title: These twins were born within minutes of each other - but have different dads
items.raw_content: Lavinia and Michelle are the only case of twins with different fathers to be recorded in the UK.
items.ai_summary: 英国首次记录一对出生仅相差几分钟但父亲不同的双胞胎。

items.title: Chris Mason: PM seeks to draw contrast with critics within his party and beyond
items.raw_content: In his interview with the Today Programme, Sir Keir Starmer addressed the whirlwind of recent events, from wars to rising antisemitism.
items.ai_summary: 首相基尔·斯塔默在采访中回应近期事件，包括战争和反犹太主义上升，试图与党内外的批评者划清界限。
